user.title: TRMNL HA Climate Connector
user.description: Paste the webhook URL from your TRMNL plugin's Settings page (Plugins → your plugin → Webhook URL).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the webhook URL. Check that it is correct and that TRMNL is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This webhook URL is already configured.

data_description.push_interval: How often this integration fetches sensor data and pushes it to TRMNL. Set this independently from the TRMNL device Refresh Rate — both must be configured.

data_description.areas: Select up to 4 areas. Leave empty to include all areas (up to 4, alphabetically).

data_description.display_mode: Each plugin instance shows either values or a chart. Use TRMNL mashup to combine multiple instances on one screen.

data_description.sensor_types: Which sensor types to show per area. Leave empty to show all available types.
data_description.chart_sensor_type: Each area will appear as a separate line (or gauge dial) for this sensor type.

data_description.chart_type: Line charts show sensor history. Gauges show the current value only (no history needed).
data_description.chart_hours: How many hours of history to show. Only applies to line charts.
